title: Per-constituency result
description: Result for a single constituency in a single election event. Includes top-N candidates plus NOTA, with remaining candidates collapsed into an 'others' bucket per processing config.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Election + (state, body, eci_no) key, candidates list, NOTA, totals, turnout, winner, top-N config snapshot, others bucket.
Replaced optional source_url with required source field per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12).
Replaced single source string with sources array of {url, fetched_at} per ADR-0002. Removed top-level fetched_at (now lives inside each sources entry).

Additive: optional name (human-readable upstream name) and authority (issuing body) fields on each sources[] entry. Aligns with Phase A schemas (feature_collection.metadata, indicator) so attribution can be uniform across electoral and socio-economic data. Per TODO/SOCIO-ECONOMIC-EXPANSION.md §6 D3.

Additive: optional gender, age, category fields on each candidates[] entry. ECI Section 10 carries these per-candidate; previously they were dropped on emit. No required-field changes; existing artifacts remain valid.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

name.description: Optional human-readable name of the upstream (e.g. "Statistical Report on General Election to Legislative Assembly of Tamil Nadu, 2021").

authority.description: Optional issuing authority (e.g. "Election Commission of India").

candidates.description: Top-N candidates by vote count, in descending rank order. Excludes NOTA (broken out separately) and excludes candidates collapsed into 'others'.

gender.description: Candidate gender per the ECI Statistical Report column (SEX / GENDER). M=male, F=female, O=other / third-gender. Null when ECI did not record a value (e.g. NOTA rows, or pre-rollout layouts that omitted the column).

age.description: Candidate age at nomination per the ECI Statistical Report column. Null when ECI omitted the value (NOTA rows, or layouts missing the column). Lower bound 18 = constitutional minimum for assembly candidacy (Art. 173(b)).

category.description: Candidate's social category as published in the ECI report (GEN / SC / ST). Reflects the candidate's category, NOT the seat reservation (which is constituency-level). Null on NOTA rows or layouts that omitted the column.

others.description: Collapsed bucket of candidates ranked below top_n_cutoff. Null if no collapsing occurred.

top_n_cutoff.description: Snapshot of processing.results.top_n_candidates at emit time. Reproducible derivations require this.
